lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: What is it, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing up here? It doesn't seem very safe.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: On the contrary, it would not be safe if we were not up here!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: You see, that creature up there has a powerful divine energy about it. That energy is used to protect itself and interfere with our own divine capabilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Divine capabilities? You mean praying to the gods?

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Praying? Yes. To the gods? That is open to interpretation.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It is?

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: I do not have the time nor desire to explain the advanced concepts of theology to you, but you should know that the Dwarves of Cam Torum take a different approach to worship than your kind.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Anyway, the point is that without experienced seers to aid you, you may find yourself unable to utilise your prayers as you normally would.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting. So we need to work together to subdue this creature?

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Indeed, just follow our lead and you'll be fine... probably.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! I'm happy to help!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Good. If you have any further questions about your role here, speak to Taala.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will, thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I trade some tomes in?

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: You can't trade in zero of an item.

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Let's make this beastie move!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Block its attacks with your prayers!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Let's convince that beastie to move!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Let's go!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Nicely done!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Steady now!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: We need to charge all of the pillars using our prayers!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Keep praying to charge the pillars!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Keep praying to bolster your strength!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Excellent! The pillars are boosting your strength!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Well done! The power of the pillars is yours!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: It's shielded itself! You need to break its concentration!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Watch out for its slam!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Go for the tail! It's a weakspot!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Well done! Now, let's weaken it a little more!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: We did it! Well done!

lines.speaker: Seer
lines.text: Oof!
